title: sutera fruticosa
intro: Sutera fruticosa, also known as the sweet utterson or sweet althea, is a type of flowering plant in the gentian family that is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sutera fruticosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Sutera fruticosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
